markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off GrowthX engagement with Relay Financial to develop a content strategy for driving organic traffic and brand awareness.](https://fathom.video/share/2sWaUtkWAD1w4Unw1JkxAKBns378oq2m?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Relay aims to move upmarket, focusing on SMBs with $750k+ annual revenue](https://fathom.video/share/2sWaUtkWAD1w4Unw1JkxAKBns378oq2m?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [Key value props: cash flow clarity, multiple fee-free accounts, employee debit card controls](https://fathom.video/share/2sWaUtkWAD1w4Unw1JkxAKBns378oq2m?tab=summary&timestamp=2324.0)
  - [Main competitors: big banks, BlueVine, Mercury; losing on interest rates and credit card rewards](https://fathom.video/share/2sWaUtkWAD1w4Unw1JkxAKBns378oq2m?tab=summary&timestamp=2518.0)
  - [Compliance process is a significant hurdle for content production speed](https://fathom.video/share/2sWaUtkWAD1w4Unw1JkxAKBns378oq2m?tab=summary&timestamp=3321.0)
  - [Goals: Increase organic traffic from 14k to 17-18k weekly sessions, boost AI-driven approvals](https://fathom.video/share/2sWaUtkWAD1w4Unw1JkxAKBns378oq2m?tab=summary&timestamp=3104.0)

## Topics

### Current Content Strategy and Challenges

  - [Shifting focus back to blog content after period of demand gen prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/2sWaUtkWAD1w4Unw1JkxAKBns378oq2m?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
  - [\~300 existing blog posts, many outdated and being pared down](https://fathom.video/share/2sWaUtkWAD1w4Unw1JkxAKBns378oq2m?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
  - [Recent uptick in AI/LLM referral traffic, mostly from older SEO-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/2sWaUtkWAD1w4Unw1JkxAKBns378oq2m?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [Limited in-house content team (Dave, Katie, some freelancers)](https://fathom.video/share/2sWaUtkWAD1w4Unw1JkxAKBns378oq2m?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
  - [Balancing demand gen requests with organic content needs](https://fathom.video/share/2sWaUtkWAD1w4Unw1JkxAKBns378oq2m?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)

### Target Audience and Value Proposition

  - [Primary focus: SMBs with $750k+ annual revenue](https://fathom.video/share/2sWaUtkWAD1w4Unw1JkxAKBns378oq2m?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [Key pain point: lack of cash flow clarity and financial discipline](https://fathom.video/share/2sWaUtkWAD1w4Unw1JkxAKBns378oq2m?tab=summary&timestamp=2388.0)
  - [Value props: multiple fee-free accounts (up to 20-50), employee debit card controls](https://fathom.video/share/2sWaUtkWAD1w4Unw1JkxAKBns378oq2m?tab=summary&timestamp=2581.0)
  - [Integrates well with "Profit First" methodology for small business finance](https://fathom.video/share/2sWaUtkWAD1w4Unw1JkxAKBns378oq2m?tab=summary&timestamp=2324.0)
  - [Recent focus on home services SMBs (e.g., plumbers, roofers) due to high transaction volume](https://fathom.video/share/2sWaUtkWAD1w4Unw1JkxAKBns378oq2m?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Direct competitors: BlueVine, Mercury, Novo](https://fathom.video/share/2sWaUtkWAD1w4Unw1JkxAKBns378oq2m?tab=summary&timestamp=2030.0)
  - [Mindshare competitors: Chase, Bank of America, other big banks](https://fathom.video/share/2sWaUtkWAD1w4Unw1JkxAKBns378oq2m?tab=summary&timestamp=2030.0)
  - [Losing on: interest rates, credit card rewards, transaction timelines (improving), lack of loan product](https://fathom.video/share/2sWaUtkWAD1w4Unw1JkxAKBns378oq2m?tab=summary&timestamp=2518.0)
  - [Winning on: multiple fee-free accounts, debit card controls, frustration with big banks](https://fathom.video/share/2sWaUtkWAD1w4Unw1JkxAKBns378oq2m?tab=summary&timestamp=2575.0)

### Content Opportunities

  - [Explore emotional aspects of SMB ownership (e.g., decision fatigue, hiring anxiety)](https://fathom.video/share/2sWaUtkWAD1w4Unw1JkxAKBns378oq2m?tab=summary&timestamp=2895.0)
  - [Address transition challenges for businesses reaching $750k+ revenue](https://fathom.video/share/2sWaUtkWAD1w4Unw1JkxAKBns378oq2m?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [Tackle money management fears and taboos among successful entrepreneurs](https://fathom.video/share/2sWaUtkWAD1w4Unw1JkxAKBns378oq2m?tab=summary&timestamp=3051.0)
  - [Create content packages on topics like hiring, scaling operations, and building thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/2sWaUtkWAD1w4Unw1JkxAKBns378oq2m?tab=summary&timestamp=2895.0)

### GrowthX Engagement Goals

  - [Increase organic traffic from 14k to 17-18k weekly sessions](https://fathom.video/share/2sWaUtkWAD1w4Unw1JkxAKBns378oq2m?tab=summary&timestamp=3132.0)
  - [Boost AI-driven approvals](https://fathom.video/share/2sWaUtkWAD1w4Unw1JkxAKBns378oq2m?tab=summary&timestamp=3301.0)
  - [Develop strategy for rapid content creation and learning while navigating compliance hurdles](https://fathom.video/share/2sWaUtkWAD1w4Unw1JkxAKBns378oq2m?tab=summary&timestamp=3321.0)
  - [Build trust and mindshare in SMB community through targeted, high-quality content](https://fathom.video/share/2sWaUtkWAD1w4Unw1JkxAKBns378oq2m?tab=summary&timestamp=3103.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule deep dive sessions on specific topics and gaps](https://fathom.video/share/2sWaUtkWAD1w4Unw1JkxAKBns378oq2m?tab=summary&timestamp=3485.0)
  - [Provide access to Google Search Console, Analytics, and CMS](https://fathom.video/share/2sWaUtkWAD1w4Unw1JkxAKBns378oq2m?tab=summary&timestamp=3505.0)
  - [GrowthX to develop initial artifacts for review within 1-2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/2sWaUtkWAD1w4Unw1JkxAKBns378oq2m?tab=summary&timestamp=3520.0)
  - [Explore ways to streamline content review process while maintaining compliance](https://fathom.video/share/2sWaUtkWAD1w4Unw1JkxAKBns378oq2m?tab=summary&timestamp=3321.0)
  - [Katie to share compliance guidelines and TLDR summary](https://fathom.video/share/2sWaUtkWAD1w4Unw1JkxAKBns378oq2m?tab=summary&timestamp=3404.0)
  - [Continue collaborative ideation and information sharing via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/2sWaUtkWAD1w4Unw1JkxAKBns378oq2m?tab=summary&timestamp=3466.0)
